name: Pomifrutas S/A
summary: Pomifrutas S/A produces, markets, and sells fresh and processed apples in Brazil. The company offers apples, including Gala, Royal Gala, Imperial Gala, Fuji, and Fuji Supreme varieties of fresh fruit. Its brands include POMIFRAI/POMI FRUTAS, LAIS, MALUS FRAI, and STAR APPLE Very. The company was founded in 1962 and is based in Fraiburgo, Brazil.
